system.description: Default config for 60Hz system with 30 fps PMU reporting rate

frequency.description: NERC frequency limits. Alert outside 59.95-60.05, warn outside 59.97-60.03

voltage_magnitude.description: Voltage magnitude in per-unit. Alert outside 0.90-1.10, warn outside 0.95-1.05

voltage_angle.description: Voltage phasor angle in degrees. Rate of change limit for detecting angle instability

current_magnitude.description: Current magnitude in per-unit. Alert above 2.0, warn above 1.5

quality_flags.description: Flag file if >5% missing data or gaps longer than 3 consecutive samples
